Functions for initializing, managing, and displaying dialog components in a UI framework.

# Purpose
This C header file provides function declarations for managing dialog windows within an application. It includes functions to initialize a dialog ([`dialog_init`](<#dialog_init>)), manage its position in a window stack ([`dialog_push`](<#dialog_push>), [`dialog_pop`](<#dialog_pop>)), and handle its lifecycle events such as loading and unloading ([`dialog_load`](<#dialog_load>), [`dialog_unload`](<#dialog_unload>)). The file also includes functions for visual management, such as displaying the dialog ([`dialog_appear`](<#dialog_appear>)), adding a status bar layer ([`dialog_add_status_bar_layer`](<#dialog_add_status_bar_layer>)), and creating and initializing an icon for the dialog ([`dialog_create_icon`](<#dialog_create_icon>), [`dialog_init_icon_layer`](<#dialog_init_icon_layer>)). The header file relies on external types and structures, such as `Dialog`, `WindowStack`, `KinoReel`, `KinoLayer`, `GRect`, and `GPoint`, which are likely defined in the included headers or elsewhere in the application.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/ui/dialogs/dialog.h`
- `applib/ui/window_stack.h`
